description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image and a global before_script that runs `pip install tox`. Define two stages: test and build. In the build stage add a build job that runs `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel` and publishes the files under dist/* as artifacts that expire after one week. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs `tox -e coverage` and extracts the coverage percentage with the regex `^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)\s*$`, a docs job that runs `tox -e docs`, a flake8 job that runs `tox -e flake8`, a test-py35 job that uses the python:3.5 image and runs `tox -e py35`, and a test-py36 job (using the default python:3.6 image) that runs `tox -e py36`.
